candidates.name: qwen35_atomic_strict_restraint_v1
candidates.hypothesis: Stricter, explicit refusal language on non-tool prompts improves restraint without hurting easy tool-call prompts.
candidates.changes: Sharpen system prompt toward conservative tool invocation.
candidates.expected_delta: restraint +0.05 to +0.15, flat or slightly improved accuracy

patch.system_prompt: Call tools only when the user request directly requires an external action. If information is already in the prompt or unknown, answer without calling tools. Be brief and explicit.

candidates.name: mistral_atomic_low_verbosity_v1
candidates.hypothesis: A shorter instruction block reduces unnecessary generations and timeout risk while preserving call selection quality.
candidates.changes: Compact system prompt with strict action criterion and no extra narrative behavior.

patch.system_prompt: Use tools only when needed to satisfy the user request. If no tool is needed, answer directly in one short response.
